creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 155590
svn diff to fix MASTER_SITE_COMP_SOURCES

MASTER_SITE_COMP_SOURCES was recently removed for
(apparently) having gone missing.
As per a recent post Stephen Roznowski, on the ports@
list. Discovering valid mirrors, was a fairly trivial task.
The svn diff attached, adds tested links to mirrors providing
the sources, the previous MASTER_SITE_COMP_SOURCES did.

Thank you!

--Chris
